docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF STATUS CONFERENCE (CHILD SUPPORT) FILED BY PETITIONER COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR MAR-26-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 416

STATUS CONFERENCE OF MAY-28-2020 CONTINUED TO JUN-25-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 416, ON COURT'S OWN MOTION, DUE TO THE COVID-19 EPIDEMIC. THIS CONTINUANCE IS PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA GOVERNMENT CODE 68115 AND THE EMERGENCY ORDER OF THE CHIEF JUSTICE OF THE CALIFORNIA SUPREME COURT DATED MARCH 16, 2020. COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER ALL ISSUES PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS IN RE: TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE INSTRUCTIONS.
